page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6v-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features an x86_64 architecture with 8 dedicated physical cores on an Intel Xeon 8163 processor running at 2.5 GHz. The system is equipped with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing 4.0 GB per core, and includes a single NVIDIA Volta V100 GPU with 16 GB of VRAM. It does not include local storage and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate a clear distinction between CPU-bound tasks and memory or cryptographic operations. Single-core CPU performance is weak, as shown by a Geekbench single-core score of 604.0 and a stress-ng single-core score of 1108.28. However, multi-core CPU performance rises to average levels with a stress-ng multi-core score of 5895.65. Memory bandwidth is a relative strength, with read-only small block cached bandwidth reaching 329.25 GB/sec and large block uncached read bandwidth at 39.02 GB/sec, both scoring in the average tier. Conversely, database operations, static web serving at 4.71 GB/sec, and Redis SET operations at 5.66 million operations per second perform in the weaker tier.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, this instance trades off raw CPU single-core speed for dedicated GPU acceleration and solid memory bandwidth. It is best suited for workloads that offload processing to the NVIDIA V100 GPU, such as machine learning training, GPU-accelerated data science, and parallel computing tasks, rather than CPU-heavy single-threaded applications or high-throughput web serving.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6v-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated instance featuring 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 CPU cores running at 2.5 GHz, 32.0 GB of RAM, and a single NVIDIA Volta V100 GPU with 16 GB of VRAM. Built on the KVM hypervisor with an x86_64 architecture, this server does not include local storage and provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Benchmark data shows weak single-core CPU performance, but average multi-core and memory bandwidth capabilities, with cached read-only memory bandwidth reaching 329.25 GB/sec. This hardware profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for workloads that can leverage GPU acceleration, making it suitable for machine learning, parallel processing, and GPU-driven data science tasks rather than general-purpose CPU-bound or high-throughput database workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6v-c8g1.2xlarge is a GPU-accelerated server featuring 8 Intel Xeon cores, 32 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA Volta V100 GPU with 16 GB VRAM, designed for parallel computing and machine learning.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.gn6v-c8g1.2xlarge features 8 Intel Xeon cores, 32 GB RAM, and an NVIDIA V100 GPU for GPU-accelerated workloads.
tagline: A GPU-accelerated server combining dedicated Intel Xeon processors with an NVIDIA Volta V100 GPU for parallel computing workloads.
bullet_points: 8 dedicated Intel Xeon 8163 CPU cores at 2.5 GHz
1 NVIDIA Volta V100 GPU with 16 GB VRAM
32.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core)
2 Gbps baseline network bandwidth and no local storage
Suited for machine learning, data science, and GPU-accelerated workloads
